card.name: Wholesome Milk
card.text: {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact. {1}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Soul Food
card.text: Flying, haste {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this creature. When this creature dies, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Uplifting Brew
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. When this artifact leaves the battlefield, target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Brain Food
card.text: {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact. {1}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Scry 1, then draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Puff Partner
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain life equal to its power.

card.name: Poisoned Apple
card.text: {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact. {1}{B}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact: Each opponent loses 3 life. Activate only as a sorcery. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Carnivorous Vegetable
card.text: Whenever a creature dealt combat damage by this creature this turn dies, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Energy Drink
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Inferno Sauce
card.text: {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact. {1}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Buns in the Oven
card.text: Haste {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life. When this artifact leaves the battlefield, if it isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Exotic Chocolate Coin
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create two tokens that are copies of it.

card.name: Winter Produce
card.text: {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact. {1}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token. Activate only as a sorcery. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Boundless Cornucopia
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, its owner shuffles it into their library.

card.name: Color Pie
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add two mana in any combination of colors. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Bread Knife
Two-for-One Special
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Delectable Delta
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Transmutive Tonic
card.text: Flash {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. When you sacrifice this artifact, until end of turn, target creature has base power and toughness 10/10 and gains trample and "At the beginning of the end step, exile this creature and create a 3/3 green Elk creature token."

card.name: Watermelephant
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Oblivionion Ring
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile another target nonland permanent until this artifact leaves the battlefield. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact You gain 3 life.

card.name: Tabascobra
card.text: First strike {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life. When this creature dies, it deals 3 damage to each player.

card.name: Evening Snack
card.text: Foods you control have "{T}: You gain 1 life." At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice a Food.

card.name: Gourmet Golem
card.text: Trample This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of Foods you control. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Cake Boss
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a Food, you get {V} (a research counter). As long as you have ten or more {V}, you may pay {0} rather than pay the mana cost for artifact spells you cast. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Cake Boss: You gain 3 life and get {V}.

card.name: Imposter Cake
card.text: You may have this artifact enter as a copy of an artifact or creature an opponent controls, except it's a Food artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life" and it loses all other card types. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Treasure Brews
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw three cards. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Reef Wellington
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) This creature can't be blocked as long as you've cast two or more noncreature spells this turn. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life. When this creature dies, draw a card for each noncreature spell you've cast this turn.

card.name: Cantelope
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life. When this creature leaves the battlefield, if an opponent controls more lands than you, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Plate of Leftovers
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. When this artifact leaves the battlefield, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Delectable Altar
card.text: Sacrifice a Food: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Rotted Roast
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life, then each creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is equal to the amount of life you gained this turn or the amount of life you lost this turn, whichever is greater. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Thoughtcheese
card.text: When this artifact enters, you lose 2 life. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. You gain 3 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sauerkraut Elder
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life. When this creature dies, search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Staff of Confection
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a Food: You gain 3 life. {T}, Sacrifice two Foods: Draw a card. {T}, Sacrifice three Foods: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. {T}, Sacrifice four Foods: You may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. {5}: Untap this artifact.

card.name: Frosted Ballista
card.text: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. {4}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals damage equal to its power to any target. When this creature dies, you gain life equal to its power.

card.name: Wurmboil Engine
card.text: Trample, prowess {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life. When this artifact dies, create a 3/3 colorless Food Wurm artifact creature token with trample and a 3/3 colorless Food Wurm artifact creature token with prowess. Each of those tokens also has "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life."

card.name: Hot Potato
card.text: Cumulative upkeep {1} (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.) Whenever this artifact's cumulative upkeep is paid, target opponent gains control of it. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, it deals damage to its controller equal to the number of age counters on it. {2}, {T}: Put an age counter on Hot Potato.

card.name: Crepe Shot
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.) {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Crepe Shot deals 1 damage to any target. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Secret Ingredient
card.text: Morph {1} (You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its morph cost.) {2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact. When this artifact is turned face up or leaves the battlefield (while it's face-up), you gain 3 life.

card.name: Infinite Truffle
card.text: {2}, {T}: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Gravy Train
card.text: Trample When this Vehicle enters, create two Food tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Crew 3 Sacrifice a Food: You gain 3 life. This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Grapevine Harvester
card.text: {T}: Add {G} for each Food you control. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Colossal Breadmaw
card.text: Trample Whenever a creature dealt combat damage by this creature this turn dies, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Irresistible Coating
card.text: {T}: Until end of turn, target nonland permanent becomes a Food artifact in addition to its other types and gains "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life." {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Cherry Bomb
card.text: {T}: Put a charge counter on this artifact. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value equal to the number of charge counters on this artifact. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain life equal to the number of charge counters on this artifact.

card.name: All You Can Eat Buffet
card.text: {X}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain X life.

card.name: Smothering Thyme
card.text: Whenever an opponent draws one or more cards, that player may pay {2}. If the player doesn't, you create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Prince of the Pie
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {G}{W}, Sacrifice another Food: Put a permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard on top of your library. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Sensei's Divining Tea
card.text: {T}: Scry 1. {2}, {T}: You gain 3 life and draw a card. Then put this artifact on top of its owner's library.

card.name: Sphinx of the Final Meal
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") If you would gain life, scry that many cards instead. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Scry 3.

card.name: Beefy Broodling
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {R}{G}, Sacrifice a Food: Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Aether Veal
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a charge counter on this artifact. {T}: You may put a noncreature artifact card with mana value equal to the number of charge counters on this artifact from your hand onto the battlefield. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain life equal to the number of charge counters on this artifact.

card.name: Underworld Bread
card.text: Each nonland permanent card in your graveyard has decompose into Food. The decompose cost is equal to its mana cost. (Pay that card's decompose cost and exile it from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a colorless Food artifact with "{2}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life," and it loses all other card types.) At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this artifact and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Salted Seer
Taffin, Lord of the Feast
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability of a Food, if {W} was spent to activate it, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. If {U} was spent to activate it, scry 2. If {B} was spent to activate it, each opponent loses 2 life. If {R} was spent to activate it, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. If {G} was spent to activate it, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Wheel of Cheddar
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Each player may discard their hand. If they do, they draw seven cards. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Decadent Dragon
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {U}{B}, Sacrifice a Food: Create a tapped Treasure token. You gain 3 life. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Sword of Sugar and Spice
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has protection from artifacts and from enchantments. This effect doesn't remove this artifact. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card. You gain life equal to the discarded card's mana value. {T}: You gain life equal to equipped creature's power, then sacrifice this artifact. Equip {2}

card.name: Tyrant of Rotisserie Ridge
card.text: Vigilance {2}, {T}: Choose one— • You may sacrifice another Food. If you do, this creature fights target creature you don't control. • You may sacrifice this creature. If you do, you gain 3 life. • This creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Frosted Flamespitter
card.text: Flying When Frosted Flamespitter enters create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {B}{R}, Sacrifice a Food: Frosted Flamespitter deals 3 damage to any target. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Bagels and Mox
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast Food or Chef spells or activate the abilities of Foods and Chefs. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Blood Pudding
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact, Discard a card: You gain 3 life and draw a card.

card.name: Kraken Roll
card.text: When this creature enters, create two Food tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Whenever you sacrifice a Food, create a 1/1 blue Tentacle creature token.
